result.stdout:
Description:

Usage:
  WolvenKit.CLI [command] [options]

Options:
  -v, --verbosity <Detailed|Diagnostic|Minimal|Normal|Quiet>  Sets the verbosity level of the command. Allowed values are q[uiet], m[inimal], n[ormal], d[etailed], and diag[nostic]. [default: Normal]
  --version                                                   Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                                              Show help and usage information

Commands:
  archive, archiveinfo <path>                             Display information of an .archive file.
  extract, unbundle <path>                                Target an archive to extract files from.
  extract-and-export, unbundle-and-export, uncook <path>  Target an archive to uncook files from.
  import <path>                                           Import raw files into redengine files.
  export <path>                                           Export a file or list of files into raw files.
  pack <path>                                             Pack resource files into an .archive file.
  build <paths>                                           Builds all WolvenKit .cpmodproj project(s) found in <paths>.
  convert                                                 Convert CR2W (extracted) resource files and convert to json.
  conflicts <path>                                        Lists all mod conflicts in your mods. [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-wolvenkit.cli-8.17.1-47ebaf71665c4e73b49f099ceccb7eff]
  hash <input>                                            Some helper functions related to hashes.
  oodle                                                   Some helper functions related to Oodle.
  settings                                                App settings
  wwise <path> <outpath>                                  Some helper functions related to Wwise. []
  cr2w <path>                                             [DEPRECATED] cr2w file conversion command.

commands.payload:
Description:

Usage:
  WolvenKit.CLI [command] [options]

Options:
  -v, --verbosity <Detailed|Diagnostic|Minimal|Normal|Quiet>  Sets the verbosity level of the command. Allowed values are q[uiet], m[inimal], n[ormal], d[etailed], and diag[nostic]. [default: Normal]
  --version                                                   Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                                              Show help and usage information

Commands:
  archive, archiveinfo <path>                             Display information of an .archive file.
  extract, unbundle <path>                                Target an archive to extract files from.
  extract-and-export, unbundle-and-export, uncook <path>  Target an archive to uncook files from.
  import <path>                                           Import raw files into redengine files.
  export <path>                                           Export a file or list of files into raw files.
  pack <path>                                             Pack resource files into an .archive file.
  build <paths>                                           Builds all WolvenKit .cpmodproj project(s) found in <paths>.
  convert                                                 Convert CR2W (extracted) resource files and convert to json.
  conflicts <path>                                        Lists all mod conflicts in your mods. [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-wolvenkit.cli-8.17.1-47ebaf71665c4e73b49f099ceccb7eff]
  hash <input>                                            Some helper functions related to hashes.
  oodle                                                   Some helper functions related to Oodle.
  settings                                                App settings
  wwise <path> <outpath>                                  Some helper functions related to Wwise. []
  cr2w <path>                                             [DEPRECATED] cr2w file conversion command.

result.stdout:
Description:
  Display information of an .archive file.

Usage:
  WolvenKit.CLI archive [<path>...] [options]

Arguments:
  <path>  Input archives path. Can be a file or a folder or a list of files/folders.

Options:
  -w, --pattern <pattern>                                     Search pattern (e.g. *.ink), if both regex and pattern is defined, pattern will be prioritized.
  -r, --regex <regex>                                         Regex search pattern.
  -d, --diff                                                  Dump archive json for diff.
  -l, --list                                                  List all files in archive.
  -v, --verbosity <Detailed|Diagnostic|Minimal|Normal|Quiet>  Sets the verbosity level of the command. Allowed values are q[uiet], m[inimal], n[ormal], d[etailed], and diag[nostic]. [default: Normal]
  -?, -h, --help                                              Show help and usage information

  Lists all mod conflicts in your mods.

Usage:
  WolvenKit.CLI conflicts [<path>] [options]

Arguments:
  <path>  Path to your Cyberpunk 2077 game folder (if left empty it will use the current working directory). [default: /tmp/inspectra-help-wolvenkit.cli-8.17.1-47ebaf71665c4e73b49f099ceccb7eff]

Options:
  -s, --structured                                            Print structured output (json).

  -?, -h, --help                                              Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Convert CR2W (extracted) resource files and convert to json.

Usage:
  WolvenKit.CLI convert [command] [options]

Options:
  -v, --verbosity <Detailed|Diagnostic|Minimal|Normal|Quiet>  Sets the verbosity level of the command. Allowed values are q[uiet], m[inimal], n[ormal], d[etailed], and diag[nostic]. [default: Normal]
  -?, -h, --help                                              Show help and usage information

Commands:
  d, deserialise, deserialize <path>  Create a CR2W file from json.
  s, serialise, serialize <path>      Serialize the CR2W file to json.

-o

Description:
  Create a CR2W file from json.

Usage:
  WolvenKit.CLI convert deserialize [<path>...] [options]

Arguments:
  <path>  Input path to CR2W files or folders.

Options:
  -o, --outpath <outpath>                                     Output directory path.
  -w, --pattern <pattern>                                     Search pattern (e.g. *.ink), if both regex and pattern is defined, pattern will be prioritized

Usage:
  WolvenKit.CLI cr2w [<path>...] [options]

  -p, --path <path>                                           [Deprecated] Input path to a CR2W file or folder.

result.stdout:
Description:
  Export a file or list of files into raw files.

Usage:
  WolvenKit.CLI export [<path>...] [options]

Arguments:
  <path>  Input path to file/directory or list of files/directories.

Options:
  -p, --path <path>                                           [Deprecated] Input path to file/directory or list of files/directories.
  -o, --outpath <outpath>                                     Output directory path for all files to export to.
  -gp, --gamepath <gamepath>                                  Path to the Cyberpunk 2077 directory.
  --uext <bmp|cube|dds|jpg|png|tga|tiff>                      Format to uncook textures into (tga, bmp, jpg, png, dds), DDS by default.
  -fb, --forcebuffers <forcebuffers>                          Force uncooking to buffers for given extension. e.g. mesh.
  -v, --verbosity <Detailed|Diagnostic|Minimal|Normal|Quiet>  Sets the verbosity level of the command. Allowed values are q[uiet], m[inimal], n[ormal], d[etailed], and diag[nostic]. [default: Normal]
  -?, -h, --help                                              Show help and usage information

  -gp, --gamepath <gamepath>                                  Path to the Cyberpunk 2077 directory.

  -v, --verbosity <Detailed|Diagnostic|Minimal|Normal|Quiet>  Sets the verbosity level of the command. Allowed values are q[uiet], m[inimal], n[ormal], d[etailed], and diag[nostic]. [default: Normal]
  -?, -h, --help                                              Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Target an archive to extract files from.

Usage:
  WolvenKit.CLI unbundle [<path>...] [options]

Arguments:
  <path>  Input paths to .archive files or folders.

Options:
  -p, --path <path>                                           [Deprecated] Input paths to .archive files or folders.
  -o, --outpath <outpath>                                     Output directory for all input archives.
  -gp, --gamepath <gamepath>                                  Path to the Cyberpunk 2077 directory.
  -w, --pattern <pattern>                                     Use optional search pattern (e.g. *.ink), if both regex and pattern is defined, pattern will be prioritized.
  -r, --regex <regex>                                         Use optional regex pattern.
  --hash <hash>                                               Extract single file with a given hash. If a path is supplied, all hashes will be extracted.
  --DEBUG_decompress                                          Decompresses all buffers in the unbundled files.
  -v, --verbosity <Detailed|Diagnostic|Minimal|Normal|Quiet>  Sets the verbosity level of the command. Allowed values are q[uiet], m[inimal], n[ormal], d[etailed], and diag[nostic]. [default: Normal]
  -?, -h, --help                                              Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Target an archive to extract files from.

Usage:
  WolvenKit.CLI unbundle [<path>...] [options]

Arguments:
  <path>  Input paths to .archive files or folders.

Options:
  -p, --path <path>                                           [Deprecated] Input paths to .archive files or folders.
  -o, --outpath <outpath>                                     Output directory for all input archives.
  -gp, --gamepath <gamepath>                                  Path to the Cyberpunk 2077 directory.
  -w, --pattern <pattern>                                     Use optional search pattern (e.g. *.ink), if both regex and pattern is defined, pattern will be prioritized.
  -r, --regex <regex>                                         Use optional regex pattern.
  --hash <hash>                                               Extract single file with a given hash. If a path is supplied, all hashes will be extracted.
  --DEBUG_decompress                                          Decompresses all buffers in the unbundled files.
  -v, --verbosity <Detailed|Diagnostic|Minimal|Normal|Quiet>  Sets the verbosity level of the command. Allowed values are q[uiet], m[inimal], n[ormal], d[etailed], and diag[nostic]. [default: Normal]
  -?, -h, --help                                              Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Target an archive to uncook files from.

Usage:
  WolvenKit.CLI uncook [<path>...] [options]

Arguments:
  <path>  Input paths to .archive files or folders.

Options:
  -p, --path <path>                                           [Deprecated] Input paths to .archive files or folders.
  -o, --outpath <outpath>                                     Output directory to extract main files to.
  -gp, --gamepath <gamepath>                                  Path to the Cyberpunk 2077 directory.
  -or, --raw <raw>                                            Optional seperate directory to extract raw files to.
  -w, --pattern <pattern>                                     Use optional search pattern (e.g. *.ink), if both regex and pattern is defined, pattern will be prioritized.
  -r, --regex <regex>                                         Use optional regex pattern.
  --uext <bmp|cube|dds|jpg|png|tga|tiff>                      Format to uncook to (tga, bmp, jpg, png, dds), TGA by default.
  --hash <hash>                                               Extract single file with a given hash.
  -u, --unbundle                                              Also unbundle files.
  -fb, --forcebuffers <forcebuffers>                          Force uncooking to buffers for given extension. e.g. mesh
  -s, --serialize                                             Serialize to JSON
  --mesh-exporter-type <Default|Experimental|REDmod>          Mesh exporter type (Default, Experimental).
  --mesh-export-type <MeshOnly|Multimesh|WithRig>             Mesh export type (MeshOnly, WithMaterials (Default), WithRig, Multimesh).
  --mesh-export-material-repo <mesh-export-material-repo>     Location of the material repo, if not specified, it uses the outpath.
  --mesh-export-lod-filter                                    Filter out lod models.
  --mesh-export-experimental-merged-export                    [EXPERIMENTAL] Merged mesh export. (Only supports Default or WithMaterials, re-import not supported)
  --opus-hashes <opus-hashes>                                 Comma-separated list of hashes to export from .opusinfo.
  -v, --verbosity <Detailed|Diagnostic|Minimal|Normal|Quiet>  Sets the verbosity level of the command. Allowed values are q[uiet], m[inimal], n[ormal], d[etailed], and diag[nostic]. [default: Normal]
  -?, -h, --help                                              Show help and usage information

commands.payload:

  -or, --raw <raw>                                            Optional seperate directory to extract raw files to.
  -w, --pattern <pattern>                                     Use optional search pattern (e.g. *.ink), if both regex and pattern is defined, pattern will be prioritized.
  -r, --regex <regex>                                         Use optional regex pattern.
  --uext <bmp|cube|dds|jpg|png|tga|tiff>                      Format to uncook to (tga, bmp, jpg, png, dds), TGA by default.
  --hash <hash>                                               Extract single file with a given hash.
  -u, --unbundle                                              Also unbundle files.
  -fb, --forcebuffers <forcebuffers>                          Force uncooking to buffers for given extension. e.g. mesh
  -s, --serialize                                             Serialize to JSON
  --mesh-exporter-type <Default|Experimental|REDmod>          Mesh exporter type (Default, Experimental).
  --mesh-export-type <MeshOnly|Multimesh|WithRig>             Mesh export type (MeshOnly, WithMaterials (Default), WithRig, Multimesh).
  --mesh-export-material-repo <mesh-export-material-repo>     Location of the material repo, if not specified, it uses the outpath.
  --mesh-export-lod-filter                                    Filter out lod models.
  --mesh-export-experimental-merged-export                    [EXPERIMENTAL] Merged mesh export. (Only supports Default or WithMaterials, re-import not supported)

result.stdout:
Description:
  Import raw files into redengine files.

Usage:
  WolvenKit.CLI import [<path>...] [options]

Arguments:
  <path>  Input path for raw files. Can be a file or a folder or a list of files/folders.

Options:
  -p, --path <path>                                           [Deprecated] Input path for raw files. Can be a file or a folder or a list of files/folders.
  -o, --outpath <outpath>                                     Output directory path.  If used with --keep, this is the folder for the redengine files to rebuild.
  -k, --keep                                                  Keep existing CR2W files intact and only append the buffer.
  -v, --verbosity <Detailed|Diagnostic|Minimal|Normal|Quiet>  Sets the verbosity level of the command. Allowed values are q[uiet], m[inimal], n[ormal], d[etailed], and diag[nostic]. [default: Normal]
  -?, -h, --help                                              Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:

Options:

  -o, --outpath <outpath>                                     Output directory path.  If used with --keep, this is the folder for the redengine files to rebuild.
  -k, --keep                                                  Keep existing CR2W files intact and only append the buffer.
  -v, --verbosity <Detailed|Diagnostic|Minimal|Normal|Quiet>  Sets the verbosity level of the command. Allowed values are q[uiet], m[inimal], n[ormal], d[etailed], and diag[nostic]. [default: Normal]
  -?, -h, --help                                              Show help and usage information

Commands:
  decompress <path> <outpath>  Decompress with oodle kraken. []

result.stdout:
Description:
  Compress with oodle kraken.

Usage:
  WolvenKit.CLI oodle compress <path> [<outpath>] [options]

Arguments:
  <path>     Input path.
  <outpath>  Output path. []

Options:
  -v, --verbosity <Detailed|Diagnostic|Minimal|Normal|Quiet>  Sets the verbosity level of the command. Allowed values are q[uiet], m[inimal], n[ormal], d[etailed], and diag[nostic]. [default: Normal]
  -?, -h, --help                                              Show help and usage information

Description:
  Pack resource files into an .archive file.

Usage:
  WolvenKit.CLI pack [<path>...] [options]

Arguments:
  <path>  Input folder or folders.

Options:
  -p, --path <path>                                           [Deprecated] Input folder or folders.
  -o, --outpath <outpath>                                     Output directory to create all archives.
                                                              If not specified, will output in the same directory.
